title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Wow... Trainer, that was a sight to behold!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My room shall become quite a spectacle with all
of these adorning my shelves.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I can hardly wait to see the look of surprise
on Chiyono O's face.
